items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of an audit trail showing 'AI agent' vs human actor.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of an audit trail comparing 'AI agent' and human actor interactions. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the existence or functionality of such an audit trail. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific tests or results that confirm this requirement, leading to an inconclusive validation.
